sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْمُدُنُ الذَّكِيَّةُ عَلَى تِقْنِيَّةِ إِنْتِرْنِتِ الْأَشْيَاءِ لِتَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ وَرَفْعِ كَفَاءَةِ الْخِدَمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni gradovi oslanjaju se na tehnologiju interneta stvari kako bi poboljšali kvalitet života i povećali efikasnost usluga.
sentences.translationEn: Smart cities rely on Internet of Things technology to improve the quality of life and increase the efficiency of services.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ الْمُسْتَشْعِرَاتُ الْمُوَزَّعَةُ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ بِجَمْعِ بَيَانَاتٍ لَحْظِيَّةٍ حَوْلَ حَرَكَةِ الْمُرُورِ وَاسْتِهْلَاكِ الطَّاقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Senzori raspoređeni po ulicama prikupljaju trenutne podatke o saobraćaju i potrošnji energije.
sentences.translationEn: Sensors distributed in the streets collect real-time data about traffic flow and energy consumption.

sentences.arabic: يُمَكِّنُ هَذَا النِّظَامُ الْمُتَكَامِلُ الْبَلَدِيَّاتِ مِنْ إِدَارَةِ الْمَوَارِدِ بِشَكْلٍ أَكْثَرَ ذَكَاءً وَتَقْلِيلِ النِّفَايَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj integrisani sistem omogućava općinama da pametnije upravljaju resursima i smanje otpad.
sentences.translationEn: This integrated system enables municipalities to manage resources more intelligently and reduce waste.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَفِيدُ السُّكَّانُ مِنْ خِدَمَاتٍ مُتَطَوِّرَةٍ مِثْلَ النَّقْلِ الذَّكِيِّ وَأَنْظِمَةِ الرَّيِّ الْآلِيَّةِ فِي الْمُتَنَزَّهَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici imaju koristi od naprednih usluga poput pametnog transporta i automatskih sistema navodnjavanja u parkovima.
sentences.translationEn: Residents benefit from advanced services such as smart transport and automated irrigation systems in parks.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ التَّكْلُفَةِ الْعَالِيَةِ، فَإِنَّ الِانْتِقَالَ نَحْوَ الْمُدُنِ الذَّكِيَّةِ يُعَدُّ خُطْوَةً حَاسِمَةً نَحْوَ بِيئَةٍ حَضَرِيَّةٍ مُسْتَدَامَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos visokim troškovima, prelazak na pametne gradove smatra se ključnim korakom ka održivom urbanom okruženju.
sentences.translationEn: Despite the high cost, the transition towards smart cities is a decisive step towards a sustainable urban environment.
